lobby.title: ACatGame
lobby.subtitle: Create a room or join by code
lobby.noAvailableRooms: No rooms are available right now.

waiting.hint: Share this code and wait for the second player

ready.pressReady: Press ready when you are set

blocker.name: Blocker Cat
blocker.description: After placement, blocks all 8 adjacent empty cells for 2 turns.

convert.name: Convert Cat
convert.description: Can only be placed next to an enemy cat and flips one adjacent enemy cat to your color after placement.

bomb.name: Bomb Cat
bomb.description: Explodes after 2 turns and clears all 8 adjacent cells along with its own.

push.name: Push Cat
push.description: Can only be placed if there is an occupied cell directly above, below, left, or right. After placement, pushes one adjacent occupied cell one step outward.

mine.name: Mine Cat
mine.description: Arms one adjacent empty cell for 2 turns, then explodes only that cell. The Mine Cat itself survives. The opponent cannot see that cell or its timer.

anchor.name: Anchor Cat
anchor.description: Acts like a normal cat, but it cannot be pushed or recolored. It can only be destroyed by an explosion.

game.matchDraw: The match ends in a draw
game.waitingForOpponentReady: Waiting for the other player to press Ready...

errors.room_waiting_for_players: Room is still waiting for players.
errors.ready_change_forbidden: Ready state cannot be changed now.
errors.ready_selection_required: Choose exactly 15 cards before pressing Ready.
